title: Tobacco Duty: rate changes
body: "This measure increases the duty rate on all tobacco products.  On 26 November 2025 rates will increase by the Tobacco Duty escalator of 2% above the Retail Price Index.  On 1 October 2026 rates will increase by the Tobacco Duty escalator of 2% above the forecasted Retail Price Index, plus an additional:   £2.20 per 100 cigarettes £2.20 per 50g on all other tobacco products  "
